hero.subtitle: Welcome to Navadurga Sanitaryware & Hardware. We provide top-tier plumbing supplies, sanitary fittings, and durable hardware to build the home of your dreams.

about.subtitle: About Our Company
about.desc_1: Located in the heart of Pokhara, Gandaki Province, Navadurga Sanitaryware & Hardware has been the go-to destination for homeowners, contractors, builders, and interior designers. We believe that every space deserves the best fitting, which is why we bring you products that combine aesthetics, functionality, and longevity.
about.desc_2: Whether you are building a new home, renovating an existing space, or managing a large-scale commercial project, our comprehensive selection and industry expertise ensure you find exactly what you need.
features: Premium quality products for lasting durability
Expert guidance and personalized customer support
Authorized dealers for top international brands
Wide range of sanitary and hardware selections
